questions: What emotions or traits do you find hardest to accept in yourself?
Can you describe an incident where you felt ashamed or embarrassed?
What behaviors or feelings do you most harshly judge in others?
When do you feel the need to hide your true thoughts or feelings?
What recurring situations make you feel powerless or out of control?
Which memories do you avoid thinking about because they are uncomfortable?
What aspects of yourself do you try to change to please others?
When do you feel most defensive or reactive?
What labels or roles do you cling to even if they cause you stress?
If you could remove one fear holding you back, what would it be?
analysis: Identify the core shadow pattern clearly.
Highlight the hidden potential within the shadow.
Deliver a concise message of encouragement.
